title: quercus robur var. vulgaris
intro: Quercus robur var. vulgaris, also known as the English oak or common oak, is a variety of the Quercus robur tree species, characterized by its broad, rounded leaves and sturdy branches. This plant is known for its rich antioxidant properties, which have been used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions, including inflammation, fever, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Quercus robur var. vulgaris include its ability to reduce oxidative stress, improve cardiovascular health, and support immune function, making it a valuable herbal remedy for overall well-being. Quercus robur var. vulgaris can be prepared into teas, tinctures, and infusions, as well as being used in herbal capsules and salves, allowing for a range of applications in herbal medicine.
